---
title: "boundaryManifest()"
description: "Derive a narrow v0 boundary manifest from current graph structure. Writable source nodes are inputs; unconsumed sink nodes are outputs; interior nodes are omitted. Auto-discovered graphless describe entries are skipped because widgets need live graph handles."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Derive a narrow v0 boundary manifest from current graph structure.

Writable source nodes are inputs; unconsumed sink nodes are outputs; interior
nodes are omitted. Auto-discovered graphless describe entries are skipped
because widgets need live graph handles.

## Import

```ts
import { boundaryManifest } from "@graphrefly/ts/inspection/boundary";
```

## Signature

```ts
function boundaryManifest(graph: Graph): BoundaryManifest
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `graph` | `Graph` | Graph that owns the created nodes or projector. |

## Returns

A `BoundaryManifest` value.

## Example

```ts
import { boundaryManifest } from "@graphrefly/ts/inspection/boundary";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/inspection/boundary.ts`
